reach_why: Combines known concerns; does not clearly introduce a fundamentally new mechanism or domain.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links continual learning, feedback-shaped evidence, legibility loss, and opaque truths into one safety argument.
falsifiable_why: Claims can be tested by measuring metric gains alongside worsening interpretability, editability, edge-case failures, and feedback bias.
explanation: Average improvement can mask growing opacity, self-induced evaluation bias, and unsafe rare failures where guarantees are needed.
